meaning: n.(婆罗门教、佛教等主张的)不杀生,非暴力主义
examples: The Ahimsa doctrine is a late development in Brahmanical culture.
A further characteristic of Hinduism is the ideal of ahimsa.
Soon Gandhi was expounding the doctrine of ahimsa (nonviolence).
The festival will also see the launch of the not-for-profit Ahimsa Dairy Foundation, which distributes organic milk in the area.
What had happened, for example, to the yogic principle of ahimsa, non-violence?
